SEARCH
Package org.plugin.refactor.code

Class LoopRewriterFinal

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ASTVisitor
org.plugin.refactor.code.LoopRewriterFinal
public class LoopRewriterFinal extends org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ASTVisitor
Final rewriting phase responsible for materializing control-flow transformations previously annotated in the AST.

This visitor performs the following actions:

  • Replaces BreakStatement and ContinueStatement nodes with assignments to auxiliary boolean control variables.
  • Introduces the necessary boolean declarations.
  • Augments loop conditions to incorporate generated control flags using logical conjunction (&&).
  • Ensures proper structural placement of new declarations even when the loop is not originally enclosed in a block.

This phase finalizes the transformation of rupture-based control flow into explicit boolean-guarded execution.

      public LoopRewriterFinal(org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.rewrite.ASTRewrite rewrite)

  • Method Details

    • endVisit

      public void endVisit(org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.BreakStatement node)
      Replaces a break statement with an assignment that sets the associated control flag to false.

      The control variable name is retrieved from properties attached in earlier phases.

      Overrides:
      endVisit in class org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ASTVisitor

    • endVisit

      public void endVisit(org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ContinueStatement node)
      Replaces a continue statement with an assignment that sets the associated control flag to false.

      The control variable name is retrieved from properties attached in earlier phases.

      Overrides:
      endVisit in class org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.ASTVisitor

    • getBody

      public org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.Block getBody(org.eclipse.jdt.core.dom.Statement node)
      Retrieves the block body of a loop if present.
